testing_centers.notes: Exam included with training. Taken online through Scaled Agile portal after attending training.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must match registration.
exam_rules: Closed-book. Online proctored. Exam is included with SAFe training course attendance. Must complete exam within 30 days of training.
renewal_options: SAFe certifications expire annually. Renew by attending training, taking a renewal exam ($50 USD), or earning required Community of Practice credits.
target_audience: team members across the value stream involved in building, testing, releasing, or supporting software-driven products
recommended_experience: Familiar with engineering and systems architect infrastructure.

retake_policy.notes: First retake included free. Subsequent retakes $50 USD each. Must complete within 30 days of training.

objectives.title: Understand culture, automation, lean flow, measurement, and recovery in practice
sub_objectives: Apply the CALMR approach to support sustainable delivery at scale.

objectives.title: Execute value stream mapping and measure flow
sub_objectives: Identify bottlenecks in the delivery pipeline.

objectives.title: Integrate continuous exploration, integration, and deployment securely
sub_objectives: Release value to end users on demand.

objectives.title: Assess current state and design an actionable DevOps transformation plan
sub_objectives: Tailor the plan to the organization.

official_study_resources.title: Scaled Agile Training
official_study_resources.notes: All SAFe certifications require attending official SAFe training
